_instructions: Add your open trades to the 'positions' list below.
The tracker runs hourly and will manage trailing stops automatically.
When a stop hits, Telegram pings you, you sell in your broker, then delete that entry.
Fields: ticker, shares, entry_price, entry_date (YYYY-MM-DD), initial_stop, notes (optional).
